title: DeathChestPlugin
description: A Minecraft plugin that spawns a chest at the coordinates where a player dies, containing all of their items from the inventory. This ensures that players can easily retrieve their belongings without the risk of losing them permanently.
body:
English:
"A Minecraft plugin that creates a chest at the location where a player dies, storing all of their items from the inventory. This feature allows players to recover their belongings without fear of losing them forever."

Español:
"Un plugin para Minecraft que crea un cofre en las coordenadas donde un jugador muere, almacenando todos sus objetos del inventario. Esta función permite a los jugadores recuperar sus pertenencias sin el temor de perderlas para siempre."
